scoring.ordering: Strict lexicographic ordering: (1) business criticality Authentication > Payment > Checkout > Orders > Products > Others; (2) seven-day mean requests/day; (3) estimated performance impact from observed P95 or unbounded payload/query amplification.

risks.evidence: src/modules/checkout/checkout.service.js:2-5 awaits stripe.paymentIntents.create in the request path.
src/modules/orders/orders.service.js:2-6 retrieves unbounded order history, then executes one item query per order.
supportingCauses: Missing Pagination on the authenticated order-history collection.
Payload Size: each order and every nested item is serialized in the same response.

risks.evidence: src/modules/orders/orders.service.js:15-16 runs an INSERT and UPDATE inside the item loop; the route schema bounds the loop to 50 items.
src/modules/products/products.service.js:9-13 reads PostgreSQL directly for every detail request while src/lib/redis.js supplies Redis.
src/modules/products/products.service.js:4-7 SELECT has no LIMIT/OFFSET; products.controller.js:2 returns the whole rows array and pagination:null.
supportingCauses: Payload Size: every selected product row is serialized into one response.

risks.evidence: src/modules/reviews/reviews.service.js:3-5 has no LIMIT/OFFSET and reviews.controller.js:2 returns all rows with pagination:null.
supportingCauses: Payload Size: free-form title and body fields are returned without a count or byte bound.

fixedHistoricalRisks.evidence: src/modules/cart/cart.service.js:3 is authenticated-user scoped and inventory bounded; the former broad cart listing is absent.

dataSourceFailures.reason: Rechecked the signed-in Datadog production-monitor account in Chrome on 03 Jul 2026. It remains on first-agent setup and visibly reports 'Waiting for the Agent to connect', so the requested endpoint metrics and production request sequences are not available.

dataSourceFailures.source: Google Analytics 4 live integration/current Chrome automation
dataSourceFailures.reason: Rechecked the named GA4 property/data stream in the signed-in Chrome session on 03 Jul 2026. The stream is still at the 'Set up a Google tag' / installation step and exposes no production traffic, geography, device, peak-hour, or request-sequence report for the API.
dataSourceFailures.fallback: Repository estimates for DELETE /api/cart/items/:id plus a conservative health-check estimate.

dataSourceFailures.reason: The checked-in Datadog seed contains P95 but not P99; no numeric P99 was fabricated.

The Google Drive/Docs connector still returned HTTP 403 PERMISSION_DENIED (and Drive fetch returned file-not-found for the connector identity), so connector-based content readback was unavailable. The authorized Chrome fallback visibly verified the exact seeded document api_load_report at the preserved URL. Its outline shows the immutable previous-run report plus the 02 Jul current-run Executive Summary, Traffic Analysis, User Journeys, Generated Tests, Risk Areas, Coverage, and Recommendations sections. The existing report was reused and no duplicate was created.

No Jira connector is installed. The authorized Chrome fallback verified APIPERF-6 (GET /api/orders) and APIPERF-7 (POST /api/orders) as To Do, unassigned tickets with complete current-run coverage, evidence, business-impact, recommended-fix, acceptance-criteria, and performance-target details. It added the missing Database-Query-Inefficiency label to APIPERF-7 and added current 02 Jul 2026 deduplication/risk updates to reused APIPERF-1, APIPERF-3, and APIPERF-5 where their seed descriptions were incomplete or had stale priority rankings. APIPERF-4 was already complete and current, and APIPERF-2 remains Done.

Exact Web_Development_Test_Team team resolution and api_load_test channel resolution returned no match; enumeration of all teams visible to the connected account returned only Empiric Infotech LLP, Development, and Flutter Team. No message was sent to an unrelated team or channel.

executionFailures.reason: The bundled pnpm runtime attempted a dependency install and stopped on ERR_PNPM_IGNORED_BUILDS for msgpackr-extract@3.0.4. No build scripts were approved automatically. Direct node --test completed successfully with zero repository test files; k6 JavaScript, Locust Python, JSON parsing, and git diff checks were run separately and passed.

executionFailures.step: Runtime execution of generated load tests
executionFailures.reason: k6 and Locust executables are not installed and the API requires PostgreSQL, Redis, and a usable Stripe test key. Static parser validation completed for every generated JavaScript and Python script.

teamsNotification.sendReadyMessage:
Execution Summary
02 Jul 2026, Asia/Kolkata (UTC+05:30). Static endpoint analysis, checked-in telemetry-seed analysis, matched test generation, Jira updates, and report verification completed. Live monitoring and Teams-destination failures are recorded in performance/risk-analysis.json.

Repository
mukeshempiricinfotech-star/api_load_testing

API Discovery Metrics
15 routable HTTP endpoints discovered: 14 business APIs and /health.

User Journeys
4 Estimated Journey flows built from repository behavior because Datadog and GA4 expose no usable production request-sequence data: Authentication Lifecycle, Browse/Discovery, Cart Management, and Purchase/Checkout.

Generated Test Scripts
4 k6 journey scripts and 4 matching Locust journey scripts plus shared runtimes/configuration. Every journey supports Smoke, Load, Stress, Spike, Soak, and Breakpoint profiles.

Coverage Summary
100% current endpoint coverage versus 61% previous coverage (+39 percentage points). Current risk count: 6; previous risk count: 6.

High Priority Risks
1. POST /api/checkout/payment — Synchronous External Call; APIPERF-4.
2. GET /api/orders — Database Query Inefficiency (N+1) with supporting Missing Pagination and Payload Size causes; APIPERF-6.

Jira Tickets
APIPERF-1 (GET product reviews: Missing Pagination), APIPERF-3 (GET product detail: Missing Caching), APIPERF-4 (checkout payment: Synchronous External Call), APIPERF-5 (GET products: Missing Pagination/Payload Size), APIPERF-6 (GET orders: N+1/Missing Pagination/Payload Size), and APIPERF-7 (POST orders: Database Query Inefficiency). Historical fixed APIPERF-2 remains Done and was not reopened.

Google Doc Link
https://docs.google.com/document/d/1YtoiGfQcVTCWpOep4suhpVGL0zXe_QXpDOHoBDT43nk/edit?usp=drivesdk

Next Steps
Prioritize the synchronous Stripe and N+1 order-history changes, batch POST /api/orders per-item mutations, add caching/pagination fixes, and rerun the six profiles after monitoring is connected. Traffic uses the checked-in 25 Jun–1 Jul Datadog seed; DELETE /api/cart/items/:id and /health are Estimated Traffic, and P99 is unavailable. The live Datadog account has no connected agent and the GA4 stream is still at tag setup.
